description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric. The sofa features two individual seat cushions and two matching rectangular back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, padded, and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette. The legs are short, block-style, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base. The overall structure is clean and geometric, with no visible decorative elements or tufting. The upholstery is plain and matte, giving the sofa a contemporary and understated appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater gray sofa with straight padded armrests, loose cushions, and short block legs. The design is minimalist and features smooth, solid upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat cushions, two back cushions, and straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the sofa's overall boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the straight armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, uniform seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all rectangular and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal with a simple finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two loose rectangular back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
